title: Device Home Screen - No Device Connected - Internet is off - Supported List
scenario: When no devices are connected and internet is off, tapping "Supported Devices" shows an internet-required dialog that can be dismissed with "Ok got it".
expected: A dialog appears with the message: "Feature unavailable. An internet connection is required to access this feature." and an "Ok got it" button. Tapping the button closes the dialog and returns to the No Devices screen.
